description: Legal document from the time of Avraham Maimonides (r. 1205-1237) regarding a debt of 96 dirhams. Written by Shlomo b. Eliyyahu. Avraham Maimonides is referenced here with the title "ha-Nagid," which he bore after 1213 CE, specifically. AA
tags: Avraham Maimonides, 13th c, Shelomo b. Eliyyahu
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-13. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
